CustomField.description: Alphanumeric code identifying the transport zone (e.g., A, B, C, D, E). This code is referenced by Transport_Rate__mdt.Zone_Code__c to link a zone to its pricing. It is also stored on Trip__c.Transport_Zone__c for audit purposes.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Enter the zone code (e.g., A, B, C). This code must match the Zone Code used in Transport Rate records.
CustomField.label: Zone Code
